name: edexui-2026
description: EdexUi-2026 is a maintained, open-source continuation of the original eDEX-UI experience.

scripts.install-linux: npm install && cd src && npm install --legacy-peer-deps && npx electron-rebuild -f -w node-pty && cd ..
scripts.preinstall-windows: npm install --global --production windows-build-tools && npm install --global node-gyp && setx PYTHON "%USERPROFILE%\.windows-build-tools\python27\python.exe"
scripts.install-windows: npm install && cd src && npm install --legacy-peer-deps && npx electron-rebuild -f -w node-pty && cd ..
scripts.prebuild-linux: rsync -a --info=progress2 src/ prebuild-src --exclude node_modules && node prebuild-minify.js && cd prebuild-src && npm install --legacy-peer-deps
scripts.prebuild-darwin: rsync -a src/ prebuild-src --exclude node_modules && node prebuild-minify.js && cd prebuild-src && npm install --legacy-peer-deps
scripts.prebuild-windows: rmdir /S /Q prebuild-src 2>nul & mkdir prebuild-src && xcopy src\* prebuild-src\ /E /C /Q /Y && node prebuild-minify.js && cd prebuild-src && npm install --legacy-peer-deps
scripts.test: rsync -a --info=progress2 src/ prebuild-src --exclude node_modules && node prebuild-minify.js && cd prebuild-src && npm install --legacy-peer-deps && npm audit --omit=dev && cd .. && rm -R prebuild-src
scripts.update-file-icons: git submodule foreach git pull origin master && node file-icons-generator.js

build.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Ali-A-Alwahed. Based on the original eDEX-UI by Gabriel Squared Saillard and upstream contributors. Special thanks to Hyder6112 and Ahmed Adnan.
